Amplify ETFs Launches the Amplify CWP Growth & Income ETF (NYSE Arca: QDVO)

holdings.infoBox: QDVO is an equity ETF with a total of 48 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 10.81%, Apple at 9.82%, Alphabet at 8.84%, Microsoft at 7.45%, and Amazon.com at 6.28%.

overview.description: The Amplify CWP Growth & Income ETF (QDVO) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in large cap equity. The fund holds long exposure to the Russell 1000 Growth Index and writes exchange-traded call options on them. The fund offers a balanced approach to growth and income by actively managing a narrow portfolio of large-cap US equities with strong growth potential. QDVO was launched on Aug 22, 2024 and is issued by Amplify Investments.

data.title: Amplify ETFs CEO on ETFs with income-focused strategies
data.text: Christian Magoon, Amplify ETFs CEO and founder, joins CNBC's Dominic Chu on 'Halftime Report' to discuss the firm's ETF suite which includes dividend and income-focused strategies via options.
